concerns.detail: Use of profanity/insult '傻逼吗' (stupid/moron) attacking the character of the critic rather than addressing the argument about resource allocation
Use of dehumanizing insult '畜生' (beast/animal) directed at the professor, constituting a pure personal attack without substantive criticism of practices

Deletion of substantive criticism about advisor Xinya Du (meeting tardiness, forcing ill students to work) shortly after addition, appearing to suppress legitimate observations about a specific advisor rather than cleanup
concerns.excerpt: UTD Xinya Du...学生身体不适强制要求完成工作
